evals.name: serial-workflow-order-check
expected: Must synthesize results after both complete
Agents must be executed serially (with await)
must_not: Must NOT skip {{PHASE_1_NAME}} and execute {{PHASE_2_NAME}} directly
Must NOT execute agents in parallel (serial workflow requires serial execution)

evals.name: parallel-workflow-both-agents
expected: Must use Promise.all for parallel execution
Must synthesize results after both complete
must_not: Must NOT execute only one agent
Must NOT execute agents serially (parallel workflow requires parallel execution)

evals.name: conditional-workflow-route-check
evals.prompt: Use workflows/conditional-workflow.js with input TODO and status={{ROUTE_CONDITION_1}}
expected: Must NOT route to {{AGENT_2_NAME}} or other agents
must_not: Must NOT route to wrong agent
Must NOT skip classification and execute default without checking condition

evals.name: loop-workflow-iteration-check
expected: Must loop until stop condition is met or max iterations reached
Must record results for each iteration
must_not: Must NOT continue looping after stop condition is met
